description_long: This rifle features a robust, industrial design with a dark metallic finish and several exposed mechanical components. The body is elongated, with dual parallel barrels at the front, each tipped with orange accents, suggesting a high-powered or specialized function. The central section includes a prominent handle and a secondary grip, both ergonomically shaped for two-handed operation. There are visible rails and mounting points along the top and sides, as well as a cylindrical component beneath the main body, possibly for ammunition or power supply. The rifle is adorned with yellow markings and subtle red highlights, giving it a tactical, high-tech appearance. Its overall construction suggests durability and functionality for urban tactical scenarios.
description: A heavy, dual-barreled rifle with a dark metallic finish, orange barrel tips, and ergonomic grips. It features exposed mechanical parts, yellow markings, and a tactical, high-tech design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the dual barrels with orange tips and the protective front sight.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the elongated body, ergonomic handle, secondary grip, and visible yellow markings.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the stock area, rear sight, and the overall symmetry of the rifle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the cylindrical component beneath the body and additional mechanical details.
